rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Utilities live in src/utils/ as single-function-per-file modules (e.g., debounce.ts, flatten.ts). Follow this pattern for new validators.","scope":"src/utils/"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Co-located tests use *.test.ts suffix next to source files in the same directory.","scope":"src/utils/"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use Result<T, E> discriminated union from src/utils/result.ts for error handling instead of throwing.","scope":"src/utils/result.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"validateKodyConfig narrows unknown input to Record<string, unknown> via type guards before field validation.","scope":"src/utils/configValidator.ts"}]}
